one_time_description: Government of Canada forgave the remaining BC Treaty Negotiation Loan balance of $179,200
economic_notes: First Nation holds interests in multiple GBEs and GBPs including camps and catering, real estate, petroleum, construction/transportation, air commission, fuel centre, and energy transmission. ADK Holdings Ltd 100% owned. Beaver Enterprises LP (construction/transportation) had revenue of $3.9M. Liard Fuel Centre LP operates gas station and fuel delivery with revenue of $1.6M.
notes: Audit is qualified due to GBE/GBP year-end mismatch (May 31 vs March 31) and use of ASPE instead of IFRS for GBEs. Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but GBE data reflects year ended May 31, 2020. First Nation has 10 GBEs/GBPs under ADK Holdings Ltd umbrella. BC Treaty Negotiation Loan of $179,200 was forgiven by Government of Canada during the year. Unnamed Benefit Agreement for $1,000,000 over 10 years - funds not yet received at year end but received subsequently. Multiple legal proceedings ongoing including election disputes. Prior year revenue and expenses not extracted as full comparative income statement was not provided in the text supplied.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
